name: Capture tab host for programmatic tab switching
description: Lets extension Activities (Tools/About) trigger a real MX Player tab switch instead of just finishing back to whatever tab was last visible.

name: Disable video ads
description: Disables video ads by patching the native library.

name: Hide Video/OTT tab
description: Hides the Video/OTT download tab from the home screen by forcing its visibility flag to always report disabled.

name: Register Modx extension activities
description: Adds the ToolsActivity/AboutActivity/tool screens and FileProvider from the extensions/core module to the app's AndroidManifest.xml so they can actually be launched.

name: Repurpose Search/Games tabs to Tools/About
description: Redirects the Search tab to the Modx Tools screen and the Games tab to the Modx About screen.

name: Restyle Search/Games tabs to Tools/About
description: Renames the native Search/Games tab labels to Tools/About and swaps their bottom-nav icons to match the repurposed extension screens.
